message:
test: Initialize LOG_LEVEL in test_unit_config.sh

Add missing LOG_LEVEL initialization to prevent unbound variable
errors when running config tests.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ RU_LOG_DIR="$RU_STATE_DIR/logs"
 # Initialize other global variables that functions depend on
 VERBOSE="false"
 GUM_AVAILABLE="false"
+LOG_LEVEL=0
 
 #==============================================================================
 # Tests: get_config_value
